div1.entryFree:
Awkward, 1) perverse, unbecoming: 'tis no sinister nor no a. claim, H5 II, 4, 85. with ridiculous and a. action he pageants us, Troil. I, 3, 149.
2) adverse: by a. wind from England's bank drove back again, H6B III, 2, 83. and to the world and a. casualties bound me in servitude, Per. V, 1, 94.
